entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
About Me

I am Jiatong Li. I am currently an M.S. student majoring in data science at University of Science and Technology of China (USTC), supervised by Prof. Qi Liu. I got my B.S. degree at USTC in 2022. My research interest includes data mining, deep learning, causal inference, Bayesian learning, and educational measurement. In 2021–2022, I used to do internships at Alibaba and iFLYTEK.

中文版本点击这里.

News

2023.3.18. A research entitled A Bayesian hierarchical item response theory model for estimating attributes of regular exams and students’ knowledge levels has been accepted to make an oral presentation at IMPS 2023 conference.

2022.5.20. One research paper HierCDF: A Bayesian Network-based Hierarchical Cognitive Diagnosis Framework accepted by SIGKDD 2022！Click here for detail.
entry.summary:
About Me

I am Jiatong Li. I am currently an M.S. studen
